calendar.matters:
Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Cristina Paxton.
Atty. Joel Yodowitz and Rose Sullivan for the Plaintiff Ameriton Properties Incorporated.
This case is also consolidated with Case No. 450936,451747 and 451810.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of Declarations in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Ameriton Properties Incorporated and against the Defaulted Defendants all persons claiming any interest in or lien upon the real property described in the judgment (see scanned document for description). These 4 properties are located at 350 and 340(3 parcels of land) Fremont Street, San Francisco, CA. Plaintiff's title to the aforementioned parcels one, two, three and four is quieted and established. Plaintiff is adjudged the owner in fee simple, absolute owners these four parcels of land. Judgment signed in open court.
